{{Quote|General, the vector patterns indicate that the TIE ship's ion stream can be traced to the planet of Radix, straight ahead|Unknown crewman|<ref name="Lando's Commandos: On Eagles' Wings">{{Tales|5|Lando's Commandos: On Eagles' Wings}}</ref>}}
'''Radix''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with a harsh climate. The surface consisted of a large [[Desert/Legends|desert]] with some smaller [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]]. The surrounding [[Realspace/Legends|space]] were full of [[Starship/Legends|ship]]-debris and other things that were pulled between the central worlds in the [[Star system/Legends|system]]. Even huge orbiting fabrics were commonly found circling the planet. A [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] renegade faction was found on the planet. They were [[Eiattu pirates]] that had gone into hiding, after the defeat at [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] went on a [[Mission to Radix]] on the behalf of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Since the [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] had assaulted republic ships trespassing the system, they wanted to put an end to unnecessary civilian losses.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|5|Lando's Commandos: On Eagles' Wings}} {{1st}}
